copy.hero_summary: The first native Android wallet for the Pearl blockchain. Monitor your rigs, move your PRL, and check live OTC rates — all from your phone.
copy.above_fold_note: Release data is populated from JSON. CI/manual builds update this manifest automatically.

components.name: Oyster wallet engine
components.scope: Vendored wallet engine compiled via gomobile. Provides core wallet functionality (key management, UTXO tracking, transaction signing).

notes: Your seed phrase never gets stored as a picture — built-in OCR lets you import a recovery phrase by pointing your camera, then wipes the image instantly. No screenshots, no gallery leaks.
Address book: save and label your frequent contacts so you never paste the wrong address again.
Live OTC price data straight from lordofpearls.xyz — see the real-time PRL/USDC rate without leaving the wallet.
Coming soon: Android home screen widget to track price swings at a glance, plus target-price push notifications so you never miss your exit.
